com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class UpdateResource.UpdateResourceRequest

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseRequest<ManageRequest>
      • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.UpdateResource.UpdateResourceRequest

    java.io.Serializable

    UpdateResource

    public static class UpdateResource.UpdateResourceRequest
extends BaseRequest<ManageRequest>

    • Constructor Detail

      • UpdateResourceRequest

        public UpdateResourceRequest()

    • Method Detail

      • setFile

        public void setFile(java.io.File file)
        Set the file you want to send. This must be a zip file.
        Parameters:
        file - A zip file.

      • setFileType

        public void setFileType(java.lang.String fileType)
        Set the file type you want to send. Default as 0:
        Parameters:
        fileType - The file type, Default as 0:

        0: Resource file(Default). A zip package which contains multiple files. Terminal will replace the files according the file names.
        1: Offline RKI key file. A zip package which contains the file which used to inject offline RKI key.
        2: Installation Package. Update the OS and App through the installation package.
        3: License file. The license file is used to activate the app.
        4: Signed Host Root CA Cert file. Either a signed .pem file or a zip package containing unsigned .pem file and it’s signed files (_S1, _S2, and _S3). The .pem file contains the Host Root CA certificates used for online processing.

      • setTimeout

        public void setTimeout(java.lang.String timeout)
        Valid value should be [200, 9999].

        The default value is 1200. When file upload finished, terminal need to execute installation before returning the final result. The value specifies the time POSLink need to wait till terminal install finished. If the value exceeds the scope or is empty, we will use default value(1200)

        Parameters:
        timeout -

      • setTargetDevice

        public void setTargetDevice(java.lang.String targetDevice)
        Used to update the firmware of the specified device. Default as 0:
        Parameters:
        targetDevice -

        0: Terminal. (Default)
        1: External Pin pad.

      • pack

        protected ManageRequest pack()
        Specified by:
        pack in class BaseRequest<ManageRequest>
